commands.read.description: Show what the read tool will return for a path, URL, or internal URI
flags.provider.description: Override provider id for `import` (e.g. when JSON `type` is unrecognized)
commands.grievances.description: View, clean, or push reported tool issues (auto-QA grievances)
flags.tool.description: Tool name when source is tool (e.g. edit, write); defaults to edit
flags.id.description: Delete a single grievance by id (clean)
flags.all.description: Clear every entry, including live PR-checkout worktrees (clear)
commands.usage.description: Show provider usage limits for every authenticated account
flags.redact.description: Redact account emails/ids (shortest unique prefix) for sharing screenshots
flags.history.description: Show recorded usage-limit history (hourly snapshots) instead of a live snapshot
commands.gallery.description: Preview tool renderers across streaming, in-progress, success, and failure states
flags.state.description: Render only the given lifecycle state(s)
flags.expanded.description: Render the expanded variant of each renderer
flags.plain.description: Strip ANSI styling from the output
flags.screenshot.description: Capture the rendered output as PNG screenshot(s) via VHS instead of printing ANSI (requires vhs)
flags.out.description: Write WAV to this path instead of playing
flags.font.description: Screenshot font family (default: JetBrainsMono Nerd Font)
commands.install.description: Install or link an extension package (alias of `plugin install`/`plugin link`)
commands.worktree.description: List or clear agent-managed git worktrees (~/.omp/wt)
flags.smol.description: Smol/fast model for lightweight tasks (or PI_SMOL_MODEL env)
flags.slow.description: Slow/reasoning model for thorough analysis (or PI_SLOW_MODEL env)
flags.plan.description: Plan model for architectural planning (or PI_PLAN_MODEL env)
flags.profile.description: Use an isolated profile for auth, sessions, settings, and caches
flags.alias.description: Create a shell shortcut for the selected profile and exit
flags.mode.description: Output mode: text (default), json, rpc, or rpc-ui
flags.config.description: Load an extra config.yml-style overlay for this run (repeatable)
flags.print.description: Non-interactive mode: process prompt and exit
flags.resume.description: Resume a session (by ID prefix, path, or picker if omitted)
flags.models.description: Comma-separated model patterns for Ctrl+P cycling
flags.tools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to enable (default: all)
flags.advisor.description: Enable the advisor runtime (passively reviews each turn and injects notes)
flags.hook.description: Load a hook/extension file (can be used multiple times)
flags.extension.description: Load an extension file before listing (repeatable)
flags.skills.description: Comma-separated glob patterns to filter skills (e.g., git-*,docker)
flags.export.description: Export session file to HTML and exit
commands.setup.description: Run onboarding setup or install dependencies for optional features
commands.acp.description: Run Oh My Pi as an ACP (Agent Client Protocol) server over stdio
commands.completions.description: Print a shell completion script (bash, zsh, or fish)
commands.bench.description: Benchmark models with the same prompt: time-to-first-token and generation throughput (tokens/s)
args.models.description: Model selectors (provider/model or fuzzy id, e.g. opus)
flags.prompt.description: Custom prompt text (default: bundled bench prompt)
flags.par.description: Execute runs with N parallel queries/requests
commands.join.description: Join a shared collab session (same as /join)
args.link.description: Collab link shared by the host (/collab)
args.pattern.description: Filter/search substring, or provider name (required for find)
flags.count.description: Number of random session ids to try
commands.commit.description: Generate a commit message and update changelogs
flags.model.description: Model selector (same syntax as --model on omp)
commands.say.description: Synthesize text with the local TTS engine and play it through the speakers
commands.tiny-models.description: Download tiny local models (session titles + memory)
args.model.description: Model selector (provider/model or fuzzy id). Defaults to the configured default model.
commands.models.description: List, search, and refresh available models
commands.dry-balance.description: Dry-run OAuth account balancing across random session ids
flags.bench.description: Send one live benchmark request per OAuth account
commands.ttsr.description: Inspect and test Time-Traveling Stream Rules (TTSR)
args.snippet.description: Inline snippet text to test (ttsr test) or directory to scan (ttsr scan)
flags.file.description: Snippet file path, or - for stdin (ttsr test)
flags.rule.description: Rule markdown file to test in isolation (skips project rule loading)
flags.source.description: Match source: text, thinking, or tool (inferred from --file when omitted)
flags.path.description: Candidate file path for scope/glob matching and AST language inference
flags.verbose.description: Show every evaluated rule, not just triggered ones
commands.token.description: Get the API key or OAuth token for a provider
flags.raw.description: Output the raw credential value without parsing nested JSON structures
flags.account.description: Select the Nth OAuth account (1-based) in stored order instead of the round-robin default
flags.list.description: List the provider's OAuth accounts (index + identity) and exit
commands.auth-gateway.description: Run an auth-gateway forward proxy backed by the configured broker
flags.strict.description: For `check`: additionally probe each credential against its provider's chat-completion endpoint. Slower; consumes a tiny amount of quota per credential.
